calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-09-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Change of Name. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Susan Lee. Petitioners sworn and examined. The Court ordered the minor's name changed to Clarissa Pei Jiun Wan. Decree signed in open court.
